copy.small_consistency_same_level_with_fewer_: Small consistency: same level with fewer repeated mistakes.
copy.if_frustration_or_pushback_shows_up_stop: If frustration or pushback shows up — stop and shorten further.
copy.after_2_3_short_sessions_we_can_see_if_t: After 2–3 short sessions we can see if the pattern repeats — then tighten the focus.
copy.if_every_session_turns_into_a_struggle_c: If every session turns into a struggle — cut to 5–7 minutes and try again tomorrow.
copy.short_measurable_practice_same_task_same: Short, measurable practice: same task, same level, emphasize reading before answering.
copy.do_not_draw_deep_conclusions_or_raise_th: Do not draw deep conclusions or raise the level based on a single result.
copy.when_accuracy_holds_without_time_pressur: When accuracy holds without time pressure — gradually return to a faster track.
copy.if_the_child_rushes_again_briefly_return: If the child rushes again — briefly return to untimed practice.
copy.one_short_untimed_practice_with_a_pause_: One short untimed practice, with a pause before submitting.
copy.do_not_turn_a_speed_weakness_into_a_subj: Do not turn a speed weakness into a subject-wide level drop, and do not push for records.
copy.when_the_child_starts_pausing_alone_befo: When the child starts pausing alone before answering — the load is easing.
copy.if_you_stay_stuck_on_hints_shorten_the_t: If you stay stuck on hints — shorten the task and return tomorrow.
copy.short_task_clear_wording_fewer_long_expl: Short task, clear wording, fewer long explanations during practice.
copy.do_not_over_explain_every_item_when_the_: Do not over-explain every item when the hard part is understanding the task.
copy.when_the_child_mostly_finishes_stage_b_a: When the child mostly finishes stage B alone — expand a little.
copy.if_independence_drops_and_mistakes_rise_: If independence drops and mistakes rise — return to more guidance for a week.
copy.do_not_move_to_advanced_before_two_consi: Do not move to advanced before two consistent sessions with reasonable independence.
copy.when_that_mistake_type_disappears_across: When that mistake type disappears across two sessions in a row — a sign of stabilization.
copy.if_there_is_no_improvement_after_two_wee: If there is no improvement after two weeks of consistency — pause and review level or wording.
copy.focused_review_of_similar_mistakes_at_th: Focused review of similar mistakes at the same difficulty.
copy.do_not_skip_foundations_or_open_too_many: Do not skip foundations or open too many topics at once.
copy.fewer_familiar_mistakes_same_task_type: Fewer "familiar" mistakes on the same task type.
copy.if_mistakes_run_deeper_than_carelessness: If mistakes run deeper than carelessness — shift to concept reinforcement.
copy.every_task_includes_a_short_check_pause_: Every task includes a short check pause before finishing.
copy.do_not_assume_a_deep_knowledge_gap_when_: Do not assume a deep knowledge gap when there is partial mastery.
copy.when_two_sessions_in_a_row_look_similar_: When two sessions in a row look similar — pick one direction.
copy.if_the_picture_changes_a_lot_between_ses: If the picture changes a lot between sessions — stay with short practice and watch, without a big change.
copy.continue_at_the_same_level_and_check_acc: Continue at the same level and check accuracy after each session.
copy.do_not_lock_onto_a_single_explanation_wh: Do not lock onto a single explanation when signals conflict.
copy.small_consistent_improvement_in_accuracy: Small, consistent improvement in accuracy or fewer repeated mistakes.
copy.if_there_is_no_movement_after_two_weeks_: If there is no movement after two weeks — update how practice is run.
copy.short_steady_practice_around_the_same_le: Short, steady practice around the same level.
copy.do_not_pile_on_big_goals_while_the_pictu: Do not pile on big goals while the picture is still forming.
